KeysToEntries.Sight_CzBren2RearSight_Description: <DEV> rear sight for CZ Bren 2 and CZ Bren 2Ms
KeysToEntries.Sight_CzBren2FrontSight_Description: <DEV> front sight for CZ Bren 2 and CZ Bren 2Ms
KeysToEntries.Sight_KacFrontMicroIronSight_Description: A compact and durable front sight designed for the AR-15 and other compatible firearms. It features a low-profile design and is made from high-quality materials to ensure reliable performance in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_KacRearMicroIronSight_Description: A compact and durable rear sight designed for the AR-15 and other compatible firearms. It features a low-profile design and is made from high-quality materials to ensure reliable performance in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechHwsXps3_Description: The EXPS3 provides a true two-eyes-open shooting experience and ensures fast target acquisition. It includes settings that are compatible with night vision and features a quick-detach base elevated by 7mm, facilitating a lower 1/3 co-witness with iron sights.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AkRearSight_Description: A standard rear sight compatible with the AK weapon platform.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MosinFrontSight_Description: A reliable iron sight attachment for the Mosin-Nagant rifle. This adjustable front sight allows for more accuracy when aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MosinRearSight_Description: A reliable iron sight attachment for the Mosin-Nagant rifle. This adjustable rear sight allows for more accuracy when aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SpringfieldM1AFrontSight_Descripti: This steel front sight post includes protective ears and is windage-adjustable, providing the classic M14 style for quick and clear target acquisition.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SpringfieldM1ARearSight_Descriptio: This precision-adjustable aperture features simple windage and elevation knobs, offering reliable accuracy in a durable, military-style design.
KeysToEntries.Sight_HkMp5FrontSight_Description: The front sight of the MP5 consists of a fixed post, providing a reliable point of reference for aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_HkMp5RearSight_Description: The MP5's rear sight is a flip-up aperture that offers close-range and long-range shooting versatility.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MossbergGhostringFrontSight_Descri: The Mossberg Ghost Ring Front Sight offers a clear view of the target, allowing for swift and precise aiming. It is suitable for use with sporting rifles and security shotguns and ensures a reliable performance in any shooting scenario.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SigSauerFlipUpFrontIronSights_Name: SIG Sauer Flip Up Front Iron Sights
KeysToEntries.Sight_SigSauerFlipUpFrontIronSights_Desc: A SIG Sauer rail-mounted flip-up front iron sight for AR rifles.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SigSauerFlipUpRearIronSights_Name: SIG Sauer Flip Up Rear Iron Sights
KeysToEntries.Sight_SigSauerFlipUpRearIronSights_Descr: A SIG Sauer rail-mounted flip-up rear iron sight for AR rifles.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Colt1911FrontSight_Description: This front sight improves accuracy with a durable, easy-to-install design for the 1911 pistol.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Colt1911RearSight_Description: This rear sight provides reliable accuracy and fast target acquisition with a rugged construction for 1911 models.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SksRearSight_Description: The SKS rear sight provides accurate aiming for various SKS rifle models, featuring adjustable settings for windage and elevation.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ColtAr15CarryHandle_Description: A detachable carrying handle for military-grade carbines and rifles, offering compatibility with the AR-15 weapon platform. Additionally, it provides the convenient option to mount an ACOG sight for enhanced aiming capabilities.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Mp7FlipFrontSight_Description: The MP7 front sight is a resilient, flip-up iron sight engineered for precise aiming. Made from high-strength metal, it incorporates a protective winged post to prevent damage and enhance alignment. The sight is elevation-adjustable, allowing for precise calibration of the firearm's accuracy, and it mounts directly to the MP7's integral top rail. Its design allows it to be folded down when not in use, minimizing interference with other attachments or optics.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Mp7FlipRearSight_Description: The MP7 rear sight is a compact, flip-up aperture sight designed for versatility and reliability. Made from robust metal, it features dual apertures - one for close-quarters engagements and a smaller one for precision shooting. The sight is adjustable for windage, allowing for precise zeroing, and it securely mounts to the Picatinny rail.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Colt1911FrontSightLPA_Description: A dovetail front sight for the Colt 1911, designed for easy installation and durability. It complements the adjustable rear sight, enhancing aiming precision and overall shooting accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Colt1911RearSightLPA_Description: An adjustable rear sight for the Colt 1911, designed for precise accuracy. It features click-in windage and elevation adjustments for accurate aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_TrijiconAcogTa01Nsn4x32_Descriptio: A durable and high-performance optic sight. It features a fixed 4x magnification and a 32mm objective lens, providing clear and precise target acquisition. Designed for military and law enforcement use, it offers a versatile reticle pattern with an illuminated aiming point for quick and accurate aiming in various lighting conditions. This scope is compatible with the Trijicon ACOH Mount.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AimpointMicroT1_Description: The Aimpoint Micro T-1 sight is versatile and adaptable, making it suitable for a wide range of firearms, including rifles, carbines, shotguns, submachine guns, and handguns. It features an integral Picatinny-style base for effortless attachment to any rail system, providing a secure and stable mounting solution.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechHwsXps2_Description: A holographic weapon sight designed for enhanced accuracy. This compact sight offers a wide field of view and unlimited eye relief, making it suitable for various shooting applications.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun503Cu_Description: A compact red dot sight designed for rapid target acquisition and improved accuracy. This sight features a crisp 2 MOA dot reticle with multiple brightness settings, allowing for easy sighting in various lighting conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun510C_Description: A versatile open reflex sight designed for quick and accurate target acquisition. The Holosun 510C is built with durability in mind, featuring a rugged construction and IP67-rated waterproofing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexViperPST_525x50_Name: Viper PST Gen II 5-25x50 Rifle Scope
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexViperPST_525x50_Description: A high-quality rifle scope with a 5-25x magnification range and a 50mm objective lens. It offers clear and bright images, even in low-light conditions. The scope features precise windage and elevation adjustments, an illuminated reticle, and a fast-focus eyepiece. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MagpulBackUp1FrontSight_Descriptio: This front sight is compatible with Picatinny rail systems and offers a low-profile design when folded down. Made from high-quality polymer, it provides excellent strength and resistance to impact.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MagpulBackUp1RearSight_Description: This rear sight is compatible with Picatinny rail systems and offers a low-profile design when folded down. Made from high-quality polymer, it provides excellent strength and resistance to impact.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Glock17FrontSight_Description: A front sight designed for Glock 17 pistols. It is a vital component of the pistol's sighting system, assisting with target acquisition and aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Glock17RearSight_Description: A rear sight designed for Glock 17 pistols. It is a vital component of the pistol's sighting system, assisting with target acquisition and aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Pu3522scopeforMosinNagant_Descript: The NPZ PU 3.5x22 scope is a modern reproduction designed specifically for the Mosin-Nagant rifle. It is a faithful copy of the WW2 classic and comes with a standard 1-inch tube that is compatible with regular rings. The scope is also practical for use with AK and SKS rifles without the case interfering with SKS models. It features a German post reticle and is constructed with a durable steel casing, providing reliable and precise performance with a straightforward 3.5x magnification. This scope is compatible with Kochetov Mount and PU 3.5x22 Kochetov Rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MossbergGhostringRearSight_Descrip: The Mossberg Ghost Rear Sights provide quick and clear target acquisition for sporting rifles and security shotguns. The metallic design guarantees an unobstructed view down-range, which enhances accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SvdRearSight_Description: The SVD rear sight is a tangent-style adjustable sight, calibrated for ranges from 100 to 1200 meters. It features a graduated elevation scale, allowing for quick range adjustments based on the ballistic trajectory of the 7.62×54R cartridge.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SvdFrontSight_Description: The SVD front sight is a hooded post-type sight mounted near the rifle's muzzle. It is elevation-adjustable, allowing for precise zeroing when paired with the rear sight. The protective hood shields the post from impacts and environmental elements, ensuring reliability even in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexRazor16x_Description: The Vortex RAZOR 1-6x is an excellent optical solution for short to medium-range tactical applications. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_M870_IronSight_Description: This front sight bead is specifically designed to fit the Remington model 870 shotgun.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ElcanSpecterDr1x4x_Description: The SpecterDR is a tactical optic with a dual field of view, seamlessly transitioning from a 4x magnification for precise long-range targeting to a 1x view for close-quarters engagements with a simple lever adjustment. Unlike conventional zoom sights, the SpecterDR features an optimized optical pathway, ensuring consistent eye relief in both 4x and 1x modes. This scope mounts directly to the rail.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu16x24Ffp_Description: This optic is suitable for use on both the AR platform and bolt action rifles. The EOTECH Speed Ring reticle enables quick target acquisition at low power while providing the necessary resolution and accuracy for longer shots at higher power. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu3518x50Ffp_Description: This Vudu optic is versatile and can be used on both AR platforms and bolt-action rifles. Its EOTECH Speed Ring reticle allows for quick target engagement at low power while also providing the necessary precision for longer shots at higher magnification. This makes it an ideal choice for short- to medium-range scenarios. This scope is compatible with 34mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_BelomoPk01Vs_Description: This is a low-profile, co-witness red dot scope with a large view field. It comes with a built-in Russian side rail mount and is filled with dry nitrogen to prevent the weeping of optics due to temperature differences. The aiming mark can be manually adjusted with an 8-position switch for discrete brightness adjustment.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Pso14x24_Description: The PSO-1 4x24 is a Soviet-designed optical rifle scope, originally made for the Dragunov SVD sniper rifle. With 4x magnification and a 24mm objective lens, it features an illuminated reticle and range-finding scale for targeting at various distances. Known for its durability, the PSO-1 is built to withstand harsh conditions, making it a reliable choice for military marksmen.
KeysToEntries.Sight_NpzPso39x24_Description: The NPZ PSO 3-9x24 is a Russian-made military-grade rifle scope designed primarily for sniper rifles, especially the Dragunov SVD. It features a 3-9x magnification range and a 24mm objective lens, offering versatility for medium-range engagements.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AxionKobraEkp1S03RedDotSight_Descr: The Kobra EKP-1S-03 red dot sight is a Russian-made device with a 1x power field of view, which allows for comfortable shooting with both eyes open. The sight is lightweight, shockproof, and sealed for durability in harsh conditions. It features 16 levels of digital brightness adjustment and ballistic correction from 100 to 700 meters.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AxionKobraEkp818_Description: This Russian Axion-made Kobra EKP-8-18 red dot sight is the latest generation of the legendary Kobra red dots. The system provides an unobstructed field of view at 1x power, allowing for comfortable shooting with both eyes open. It features elevation and windage adjustments, ballistic correction limits from 100-700m, a lightweight and shockproof design, a sealed body, and is suitable for use even in severe conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun507cX2_Description: The HS507C X2 sight provides a switchable reticle with either a 2 MOA dot or a 2 MOA dot with a 32 MOA circle. Additionally, it is equipped with a solar panel for automatic reticle adjustment. This sight can be mounted on a Picatinny/Weaver rail or with an RMR plate for pistols.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexViperRedDot_Description: A top-tier compact red dot sight primarily designed for handguns with a cutout slide but also versatile as a backup sight for a riflescope. Constructed from durable aluminum alloy, it is waterproof and features highly polished glass, providing a clear and sharp image from edge to edge. With its deliberate reticle design (6 MOA dot), it is especially suitable for short to medium-distance shooting.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Skorpionvz61RearSight_Description: A rear sight for the Vz. 61 Skorpion.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechHwsXps2Circle1Dot_Descriptio: A holographic weapon sight designed for enhanced accuracy. This compact sight offers a wide field of view and unlimited eye relief, making it suitable for various shooting applications.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechHwsXps3Circle2Dot_Descriptio: The EXPS3 provides a true two-eyes-open shooting experience and ensures fast target acquisition. It includes settings that are compatible with night vision and features a quick-detach base elevated by 7mm, facilitating a lower 1/3 co-witness with iron sights.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechHwsXps2Circle2DotFDE_Descrip: A holographic weapon sight designed for enhanced accuracy. This compact sight offers a wide field of view and unlimited eye relief, making it suitable for various shooting applications.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Glock17OemTritiumFrontSight_Descri: The front sight of the Glock Tritium Iron Sights incorporates a tritium insert to provide reliable illumination in low-light settings. Its vibrant color contrast facilitates swift target acquisition, enhancing accuracy in demanding situations.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Glock17OemTritiumRearSight_Descrip: The rear sight of the Glock Tritium Iron Sights features tritium inserts for reliable visibility in low-light conditions. Its serrated surface reduces glare and improves sight alignment, promoting swift target acquisition and shot placement even in demanding environments.
KeysToEntries.Sight_M16A1UpperReceiver_Name: M16A1 Upper Receiver Rear Iron Sight
KeysToEntries.Sight_Type33SlideFrontSight_Description: A rugged, fixed-blade sight positioned at the firearm's muzzle for precise aiming and target acquisition.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Type33SlideRearSight_Description: A Fixed notch sight at the rear of the firearm designed to align with the front sight for accurate aiming and firing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Type51SlideFrontSight_Description: A rugged, fixed-blade sight positioned at the firearm's muzzle for precise aiming and target acquisition.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Type51SlideRearSight_Description: A fixed notch sight at the rear of the firearm designed to align with the front sight for accurate aiming and firing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_PiladP1x42_Description: This sight is ideal for hunting and sport shooting and features a 2 MOA dot, nine brightness levels, and easy two-button operation. It has a durable aluminum alloy construction with an integrated Weaver/Picatinny mount.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Okp7Picatinny_Description: This sight allows for the unobstructed use of basic mechanical sights and features a rimless reflector mount that ensures no interference with any field of fire segments. The reflector is protected by a thin and resilient visor that is barely noticeable during firing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_PiladP25x24lBrevis_Description: A prismatic sight designed primarily for use on AK rifles. The etched reticle in the glass, known as the LDT reticle, is suitable for both precision shooting and quick target acquisition on the move. This scope mounts directly to the rail.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Ak12RearSight_Description: The AK-12 rear sight is mounted further back on the receiver compared to earlier AK models, providing a longer sight radius that enhances aiming accuracy whether the stock is extended or collapsed. Constructed from steel, the sight assembly ensures durability and reliability in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_1911TrijconTritiumFrontSight_Descr: This front sight for the Colt 1911 is designed to complement the rear sight and provide a clear, bright aiming point in all lighting conditions. It features a tritium insert that glows green in the dark for visibility in low-light situations.
KeysToEntries.Sight_1911TrijconTritiumRearSight_Descri: This rear sight for the Colt 1911 is designed for excellent visibility in low-light conditions and features tritium inserts that glow brightly in the dark.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Aks74URearSight_Description: Unlike the AK-74's longer rear sight, the AKS-74U uses a 2-position sight with settings for 200 meters and 400 meters. This accounts for the reduced range due to the shorter barrel.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ColtCommanderRearSight_Description: This durable, low-profile sight is designed for Colt Commanders and other 1911 firearms. It features a wide-notch design that enhances sight alignment and facilitates faster target acquisition, all while maintaining a snag-free, carry-friendly profile.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ColtCommanderFrontSight_Descriptio: This fixed, low-profile blade sight has been engineered for rapid target acquisition and durability.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Colt1911FrontSightMidas_Descriptio:
This front sight improves accuracy with a durable, easy-to-install design for the 1911 pistol.

This is a part of the Colt 1911 belonging to Songkram "Golden Boy" Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Colt1911RearSightMidas_Description:
This rear sight provides reliable accuracy and fast target acquisition with a rugged construction for 1911 models.

This is a part of the Colt 1911 belonging to Songkram "Golden Boy" Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexSpitfire5x_Description: ​The Vortex Spitfire HD Gen II 5x Prism Scope is a second-generation prismatic sight offering 5x magnification and an enhanced HD optical system. Designed primarily for use with AR-type rifles, it provides a compact and robust solution for shooters seeking rapid target acquisition and clarity.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AimpointMicroH2_Description: The Aimpoint Micro H-2 is a compact red dot reflex sight with a 2 MOA dot, designed for hunting and sport shooting. It features a rugged aluminum housing, advanced lens coatings for improved clarity, and long battery life, ensuring reliable performance in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AimpointMicroT2_Description: A high-performance optic with a precise 2 MOA red dot, advanced lenses, and cutting-edge coatings. It features flip-up lens caps for quick response and a rugged body for increased durability in any environment.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Kaps4x36_Description: ​The Kaps Classic 4x36 RC/OC is a fixed-magnification riflescope designed for hunters seeking a traditional and reliable optic. Its 4x magnification and 36mm objective lens make it suitable for short to medium-range engagements. The scope features multi-coated precision optics for enhanced clarity and light transmission.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AimpointAcroP2_Description: The Aimpoint Acro P-2 is a compact, enclosed red dot reflex sight with a 3.5 MOA dot. Designed for durability, it features a rugged aluminum housing, improved battery life, and reliable performance in harsh conditions, making it suitable for handguns, rifles, and professional use.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun503CuGreen_Description: A compact red dot sight designed for rapid target acquisition and improved accuracy. This sight features a crisp 2 MOA dot reticle with multiple brightness settings, allowing for easy sighting in various lighting conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_PiladP1x42CAMO_Description: This sight is ideal for hunting and sport shooting and features a 2 MOA dot, nine brightness levels, and easy two-button operation. It has a durable aluminum alloy construction with an integrated Weaver/Picatinny mount.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexRazor16xCAMO_Description: The Vortex RAZOR 1-6x is an excellent optical solution for short to medium-range tactical applications. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu3518x50FfpCAMO_Descripti: This Vudu optic is versatile and can be used on both AR platforms and bolt-action rifles. Its EOTECH Speed Ring reticle allows for quick target engagement at low power while also providing the necessary precision for longer shots at higher magnification. This makes it an ideal choice for short- to medium-range scenarios. This scope is compatible with 34mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu3518x50FfpCAMOSVD_Descri: This Vudu optic is versatile and can be used on both AR platforms and bolt-action rifles. Its EOTECH Speed Ring reticle allows for quick target engagement at low power while also providing the necessary precision for longer shots at higher magnification. This makes it an ideal choice for short- to medium-range scenarios. This scope is compatible with 34mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexViperPST_525x50Camo_Name: Yen's Viper PST Gen II 5-25x50 Rifle Scope
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexViperPST_525x50Camo_Descript:
A high-quality rifle scope with a 5-25x magnification range and a 50mm objective lens. It offers clear and bright images, even in low-light conditions. The scope features precise windage and elevation adjustments, an illuminated reticle, and a fast-focus eyepiece. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.

This is a part of the Remington M700 belonging to Bane "Yen" Seeha, the military commander of Midnight Sapphire.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Ak12RearSightCAMO_Description: The AK-12 rear sight is mounted further back on the receiver compared to earlier AK models, providing a longer sight radius that enhances aiming accuracy whether the stock is extended or collapsed. Constructed from steel, the sight assembly ensures durability and reliability in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SaVz58RearSight_Description: This steel flip-up front sight cover is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle. When closed, it protects the front sight post from impact and debris, and it flips open when aiming. The cover is manufactured to original Czech military specifications for a precise, reliable fit.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexAmg110x24Lpvo_Description: A low-power, variable optic with 1–10x magnification and an illuminated reticle. It is designed for quick target acquisition and long-distance use. It features durable construction with reliable zero retention for field conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AimpointAcroP2GN_Description: The Aimpoint Acro P-2 is a compact, enclosed red dot reflex sight with a 3.5 MOA dot. Designed for durability, it features a rugged aluminum housing, improved battery life, and reliable performance in harsh conditions, making it suitable for handguns, rifles, and professional use.
KeysToEntries.Sight_PiladP1x42JC_Name: Pilad P1x42 Red Dot Sight (Jackal Company)
KeysToEntries.Sight_PiladP1x42JC_Description: This sight is ideal for hunting and sport shooting and features a 2 MOA dot, nine brightness levels, and easy two-button operation. It has a durable aluminum alloy construction with an integrated Weaver/Picatinny mount.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexRazor16xPL_Description: The Vortex RAZOR 1-6x is an excellent optical solution for short to medium-range tactical applications. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu3518x50FfpHT_Description: This Vudu optic is versatile and can be used on both AR platforms and bolt-action rifles. This makes it an ideal choice for short- to medium-range scenarios. This scope is compatible with 34mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu3518x50FfpSW_Description: This Vudu optic is versatile and can be used on both AR platforms and bolt-action rifles. Its EOTECH Speed Ring reticle allows for quick target engagement at low power while also providing the necessary precision for longer shots at higher magnification. This makes it an ideal choice for short- to medium-range scenarios. This scope is compatible with 34mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexViperPST_525x50GC_Name: Viper PST Gen II 5-25x50 Rifle Scope (Gray Company)
KeysToEntries.Sight_VortexViperPST_525x50GC_Descriptio: A high-quality rifle scope with a 5-25x magnification range and a 50mm objective lens. It offers clear and bright images, even in low-light conditions. The scope features precise windage and elevation adjustments, an illuminated reticle, and a fast-focus eyepiece. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MagpulBackUp1FrontSightGN_Descript: This front sight is compatible with Picatinny rail systems and offers a low-profile design when folded down. Made from high-quality polymer, it provides excellent strength and resistance to impact.
KeysToEntries.Sight_MagpulBackUp1RearSightGN_Descripti: This rear sight is compatible with Picatinny rail systems and offers a low-profile design when folded down. Made from high-quality polymer, it provides excellent strength and resistance to impact.

KeysToEntries.Sight_KacFrontMicroIronSightPL_Name: Folding Micro Front Iron Sight (Phantom Lance)
KeysToEntries.Sight_KacFrontMicroIronSightPL_Descripti: A compact and durable front sight designed for the AR-15 and other compatible firearms. It features a low-profile design and is made from high-quality materials to ensure reliable performance in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_KacFrontMicroIronSightRT_Name: Folding Micro Front Iron Sight (Raven Team)
KeysToEntries.Sight_KacFrontMicroIronSightRT_Descripti: A compact and durable front sight designed for the AR-15 and other compatible firearms. It features a low-profile design and is made from high-quality materials to ensure reliable performance in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_KacRearMicroIronSightPL_Name: Folding Micro Rear Iron Sight (Phantom Lance)
KeysToEntries.Sight_KacRearMicroIronSightPL_Descriptio: A compact and durable rear sight designed for the AR-15 and other compatible firearms. It features a low-profile design and is made from high-quality materials to ensure reliable performance in various conditions.

KeysToEntries.Sight_KacRearMicroIronSightRT_Descriptio: A compact and durable rear sight designed for the AR-15 and other compatible firearms. It features a low-profile design and is made from high-quality materials to ensure reliable performance in various conditions.

The sight is elevation-adjustable, allowing for precise calibration of the firearm's accuracy, and it mounts directly to the MP7's integral top rail. Its design allows it to be folded down when not in use, minimizing interference with other attachments or optics.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Mp7FlipRearSightSC_Description: The MP7 rear sight is a compact, flip-up aperture sight designed for versatility and reliability. Made from robust metal, it features dual apertures - one for close-quarters engagements and a smaller one for precision shooting. The sight is adjustable for windage, allowing for precise zeroing, and it securely mounts to the Picatinny rail.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AlienFrontSight_Description: A precision-machined front sight designed for the Laugo Arms Alien to provide fast target acquisition and a clear sight picture.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AlienRearSight_Description: A durable rear sight offers a clear, adjustable aiming reference for precise shooting with the Laugo Arms Alien.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AimpointMicroT2FDE_Description: A high-performance optic with a precise 2 MOA red dot, advanced lenses, and cutting-edge coatings. It features flip-up lens caps for quick response and a rugged body for increased durability in any environment.

It includes settings that are compatible with night vision and features a quick-detach base elevated by 7mm, facilitating a lower 1/3 co-witness with iron sights.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun510CFDE_Description: A versatile open reflex sight designed for quick and accurate target acquisition. The Holosun 510C is built with durability in mind, featuring a rugged construction and IP67-rated waterproofing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ElcanSpecterDr1x4xFDE_Description: The SpecterDR is a tactical optic with a dual field of view, seamlessly transitioning from a 4x magnification for precise long-range targeting to a 1x view for close-quarters engagements with a simple lever adjustment. Unlike conventional zoom sights, the SpecterDR features an optimized optical pathway, ensuring consistent eye relief in both 4x and 1x modes. This scope mounts directly to the rail.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun510RT_Description: A versatile open reflex sight designed for quick and accurate target acquisition. The Holosun 510C is built with durability in mind, featuring a rugged construction and IP67-rated waterproofing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun510SC_Description: A versatile open reflex sight designed for quick and accurate target acquisition. The Holosun 510C is built with durability in mind, featuring a rugged construction and IP67-rated waterproofing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun510CRT_Description: A versatile open reflex sight designed for quick and accurate target acquisition. The Holosun 510C is built with durability in mind, featuring a rugged construction and IP67-rated waterproofing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Holosun510CSC_Description: A versatile open reflex sight designed for quick and accurate target acquisition. The Holosun 510C is built with durability in mind, featuring a rugged construction and IP67-rated waterproofing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AkRearSightJC_Description: A standard rear sight compatible with the AK weapon platform.
KeysToEntries.Sight_TrijiconAcogTa01Nsn4x32FDE_Descrip: A durable and high-performance optic sight. It features a fixed 4x magnification and a 32mm objective lens, providing clear and precise target acquisition. Designed for military and law enforcement use, it offers a versatile reticle pattern with an illuminated aiming point for quick and accurate aiming in various lighting conditions. This scope is compatible with the Trijicon ACOH Mount.
KeysToEntries.Sight_LaugoRedDot_Description: A compact open reflex sight designed for the Alien pistol series. It features a bright 6 MOA dot for quick target acquisition, adjustable brightness settings, and locking windage and elevation adjustments that maintain zero under recoil. It is compatible with C-MORE RTS mounting systems.
KeysToEntries.Sight_TrijiconMicro_Description: A reflex-style, sealed sight with a 25mm objective, intended for use on rifles, carbines, and shotguns, that facilitates fast target acquisition. Designed for use with both eyes open, it enables for maximum situational awareness.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ColtCommanderRearSightAvi_Descript:
This durable, low-profile sight is designed for Colt Commanders and other 1911 firearms. It features a wide-notch design that enhances sight alignment and facilitates faster target acquisition, all while maintaining a snag-free, carry-friendly profile.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ColtCommanderFrontSightAvi_Descrip:
This fixed, low-profile blade sight has been engineered for rapid target acquisition and durability.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.Sight_AkRearSightMedved_Description:
A rear sight compatible with the AK weapon platform.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ColtCommanderRearSightHel_Descript:
This durable, low-profile sight is designed for Colt Commanders and other 1911 firearms. It features a wide-notch design that enhances sight alignment and facilitates faster target acquisition, all while maintaining a snag-free, carry-friendly profile.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ColtCommanderFrontSightHel_Descrip:
This fixed, low-profile blade sight has been engineered for rapid target acquisition and durability.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Remington788RearSight_Description: This removable open-notch sight assembly bolts to the sight rib. The narrow U/V notch provides a precise sight picture for accurate shots while allowing for quick, instinctive aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_Remington788FrontSight_Description: This is a small, ramped blade sight seated in a compact base. Its clean, angled face allows for quick target acquisition at close to medium ranges.
KeysToEntries.Sight_TrijiconRMRType2_Description: The RMR Type 2 Adjustable LED is a durable, impact-resistant sight equipped with upgraded electronics proven on slide-ride pistols and small firearms. It provides easy side-button brightness control with manual and automatic modes, a button-lock feature, night-vision compatibility, and the popular 3.25 MOA dot for quick target acquisition and precise shooting at different ranges.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechG33Magnifier_Description: The G33 Magnifier is compact, lightweight, and designed for quick switching between 3x and 1x magnification. It features tool-free adjustments, a wide field of view and an adjustable diopter for precise focusing. It is compatible with all EOTECH HWS models.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechG33MagnifierTan_Description: The G33 Magnifier is compact, lightweight, and designed for quick switching between 3x and 1x magnification. It features tool-free adjustments, a wide field of view and an adjustable diopter for precise focusing. It is compatible with all EOTECH HWS models.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechG45Magnifier_Description: The G45 5x Magnifier delivers enhanced precision at longer ranges thanks to its compact and lightweight design. Allowing rapid transition between 5x and 1x magnification, it features tool-free adjustments and provides a wide field of view. It is compatible with all EOTECH HWS models.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechG45MagnifierTan_Description: The G45 5x Magnifier delivers enhanced precision at longer ranges thanks to its compact and lightweight design. Allowing rapid transition between 5x and 1x magnification, it features tool-free adjustments and provides a wide field of view. It is compatible with all EOTECH HWS models.
KeysToEntries.Sight_3XPMagnifier_Description: The Aimpoint 3X-P Magnifier is a military-grade optic designed to enhance observation and target acquisition over longer distances. The 3X-P can be used with Aimpoint red dot sights or as a handheld monocular, providing sharp, reliable performance.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu16x24FfpGreen_Descriptio: This optic is suitable for use on both the AR platform and bolt action rifles. The EOTECH Speed Ring reticle enables quick target acquisition at low power while providing the necessary resolution and accuracy for longer shots at higher power. This scope is compatible with 30mm rings.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ModelSAI6_Description: The SAI 6 is a versatile combat LPVO designed for use with carbines. It features a 1–6× zoom, a 24mm objective lens, and a first-focal-plane illuminated Rapid Aiming Feature reticle. It offers approximately 10 illumination settings and has a rugged anodized finish.
KeysToEntries.Sight_M201cSlideFrontSight_Description: A front sight designed for M-201C pistols. It is a vital component of the pistol's sighting system, assisting with target acquisition and aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_M201cSlideRearSight_Description: A rear sight designed for M-201C pistols. It is a vital component of the pistol's sighting system, assisting with target acquisition and aiming.
KeysToEntries.Sight_M201CSlidePsychoFrontSight_Descrip:
A front sight designed for M-201C pistols. It is a vital component of the pistol's sighting system, assisting with target acquisition and aiming.

This is a part of the M-201C belonging to Kahoku "Bloodhound" Phongsa, the leader of the Kiu Vongsa criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Sight_M201CSlidePsychoRearSight_Descript:
A rear sight designed for M-201C pistols. It is a vital component of the pistol's sighting system, assisting with target acquisition and aiming.

This is a part of the M-201C belonging to Kahoku "Bloodhound" Phongsa, the leader of the Kiu Vongsa criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SvdFrontSightSW_Description: The SVD front sight is a hooded post-type sight mounted near the rifle's muzzle. It is elevation-adjustable, allowing for precise zeroing when paired with the rear sight. The protective hood shields the post from impacts and environmental elements, ensuring reliability even in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ElcanSpecterDr1x4xBH_Description: The SpecterDR is a tactical optic with a dual field of view, seamlessly transitioning from a 4x magnification for precise long-range targeting to a 1x view for close-quarters engagements with a simple lever adjustment. Unlike conventional zoom sights, the SpecterDR features an optimized optical pathway, ensuring consistent eye relief in both 4x and 1x modes. This scope mounts directly to the rail.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SpringfieldM1AFrontSightBH_Descrip: This steel front sight post includes protective ears and is windage-adjustable, providing the classic M14 style for quick and clear target acquisition.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SpringfieldM1ARearSightBH_Descript: This precision-adjustable aperture features simple windage and elevation knobs, offering reliable accuracy in a durable, military-style design.
KeysToEntries.Sight_ATACR735x56_Description: A high-powered, precision optic designed for long-range engagements. Its variable 7–35× zoom and 56mm objective provide clear visuals and target identification at long distances, while the first focal plane illuminated reticle enables accurate hold marks at any magnification. Built on a 34mm aluminum tube, it offers maximum adjustment range and durability in field conditions.
KeysToEntries.Sight_LeupoldFxiiScout_Description: A compact 2.5× fixed-power scout riflescope for quick target acquisition on forward-mounted or scout-style rifles. It uses a Duplex reticle, low-profile aluminum housing, and durable optical coatings for rugged, reliable short-to-medium-range use.
KeysToEntries.Sight_EotechVudu39x32Sfp_Description: The EOTech Vudu 3–9×32 SFP is a compact, second-focal-plane riflescope suited for short-to-medium range work. It offers 3–9× magnification with a 32 mm objective, an illuminated reticle, capped ¼-MOA turrets, and a short 6.8″, rugged aluminum chassis.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SaVz58FrontSight_Description: A front sight pin for the Sa vz. 58. It secures the front sight post and allows precise height adjustment for accurate zeroing.
KeysToEntries.Sight_SaVz58FrontSightTritium_Descriptio: An upgraded front sight pin with a tritium insert. Maintains zeroing while providing a constant glow for improved visibility in low-light conditions.
